name: nostalgic
description: Traditional classroom warmth with chalkboard texture, vintage academia aesthetics, and the romantic notion of knowledge passed down through generations. This mood connects modern learning to timeless educational traditions.

style.lighting: warm classroom natural light | soft overhead fluorescent with warmth | library golden glow
style.color_grade: warm sepia-tinted | muted greens and browns | vintage academic palette
style.camera: medium shot classroom | close-up chalkboard writing | slow pan across bookshelves
style.composition: chalkboard as canvas | stacked books as props | library depth framing
style.props: green chalkboard, chalk, vintage globe, leather-bound books, wooden desk, ink pen, spectacles

copy_tone: Thoughtful and wise, referencing the long tradition of teaching and learning. Uses phrases like 'as scholars have long known' and 'timeless wisdom.' Reverent toward knowledge itself.

music.mood: soft classical strings, library ambiance, old record warmth

example_prompt_fragment: A warm vintage classroom scene with a green chalkboard covered in elegant chalk diagrams, afternoon sunlight streaming through tall windows onto a wooden desk, leather-bound books stacked beside a vintage globe, reading spectacles resting on an open journal, warm sepia-tinted muted color palette, scholarly vintage academia photography
